caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio featuring a grey, ridged acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, with the text "Rode" and "Procaster" visible on the equipment. The man has tattoos on his right arm. Across the sequence, he is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. In the first frame, his eyes are squinted and his mouth is partially open. By the second frame, his eyes are more open and he is mid-sentence. In the third frame, he looks slightly to the left while continuing to speak, and in the final frame, he shifts his gaze further to the left with his mouth open, as if emphasizing a point during a conversation.
